feed.title: SAP Community - SAP NetWeaver
feed.subtitle: SAP NetWeaver Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Last Logon date not updated in SAP in USR02 table.
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

we have encountered an Audit issue where user when login in from SAPGUI, users login is getting recorded properly in USR02 table. 
But when users are login in from Fiori or salesfore, etc. the login Records are not updating in table, though the users are having same SAP id.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Custom button calling a custom screen
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am working in a RAP managed scenario where we have a custom screen ( OData V4 - UI ) and on that screen we have a custom button and the requirement is:

When the user clicks on the custom button, a new screen should appear (with the same data as the home screen and new fields), on that new screen the user will fill in some data, click on a button and we will process that data.

Is it possible to build this scenario? How can I make a custom button call a custom screen? And how can I develop this new screen?

Please, any help will be appreciated.

Thank you.

entry.title: Updating hostname of AIX having Netweaver server installed
entry.content:
Hi ,

Do we need to update Netweaver server license/reactive again, if we change hostname of AIX server ?

entry.title: How to improve replication in sap system during system refresh
entry.content:
Hi Team, Greetings!We are planning to refresh our satellite or source systems CAG(AFS), CBG(BW), CRG(RET)Post refresh, we will be replicating data from these source systems to PERSON_NAME Cloud.AFS- 286 tables to be replicated >> this will take 3 days.BW - 45 tables to be replicated >> Not more than half day.RET - 452 tables to be replicated >> This will take 5 days.Currently we have another project coming and we have a tight schedule and need to ensure all these replication finishes as soon as possible.Previously we were following below approach:Start with replication of AFS first, once done, deactivate the config and then start with replication of RET.When we performed replication for AFS and RET in parallel, we observed that it took more time.Could you let us know what would be the best approach to get these replications completed sooner.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Connect SAP 4.7 to SAP Netweaver Gateway as a Hub Deployment
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

We have requirement to connect SAP 4.7 system with SAP NW gateway system (as a hub deployment). We are planning to expose o-data services through NW gateway system.  But as a first step can we really connect SAP 4.7 with gateway 2.0 as 4.7 doesn't have netweaver components?

If not, then can we have webservice created in SAP 4.7 to expose the data to SAP UI5 applications?

Thank you in advance for your valuable input.

entry.title: SAP NetWeaver 7.50 PO installation
entry.content:
Hello team,

We got requirement to install SAP netwever 7.5 po stack 30

can you confirm  RHEL 9.0 version can be support oracle 19c and SAP NetWeaver 7.50(PO)

Thanks, 

Jagadeesh

entry.title: Data migration error for tables with huge records
entry.content:
We are doing remote conversion from BW **on PERSON_NAME to BW4HANA.

As part of data migration we found errors while migrating below tables during READ.

/BIC/AZ***0100    -  3 billion records
/BIC/AZ*** 0500    - 45 million records
/BIC/FZ*** 14      - 2.1 billion records
/BIC/FZ*** 14      - 3.3 billion records

From job log we couldn't find any error. Tried REDO still results in error.

Need your inputs to fix the issue.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Deploy IDM component on PO system
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Do we need license to deploy IDM component on PO (Process Orchestration) system? We have PO license.

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: MD73 Assigned Quantity Field
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a requirement to develop a custom report using data from MD73 transaction. However, I am having trouble getting the values for 'Assigned Qty' field.

I can get most of the other fields using BAPI_MATERIAL_STOCK_REQ_LIST or MD_STOCK_REQUIREMENTS_LIST_API, but this field is missing.

Submitting the report SAPMM60X does not work, and I have also tried calling FM 'REQUIREMENTS_ALLOCATION'  using the same input as the standard program, but the results I get are different from the ones in MD73.

Is there any other bapi/method?

Regards,

Tudor

entry.title: Problem after migration TREX
entry.content:
Dear Support,

During the migration of TREX, we recreated the indexes with the same ID as the original system, but it takes a long time to transition from the "to be preprocessed" state to the "to be indexed" state.

The indexing occurs, but very slowly.

What can we do?

entry.title: Unable to edit infoobjects in the BW modeller
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

Not able to edit infoobject in the HANA BW modeller in the WAD system of Colgate.

giving me the error as not authorized

entry.title: Change TREX UI port.
entry.content:
When we launch transaction ESH_COCKPIT, by default the URL is going to port 8000.

How do we change to 8443?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: request kernel release 1433
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

  We want to upgrade kernel version to SAP KERNEL 7.53 64-BIT UNICODE  patch 1433 according to note 3554667, but there is only 1445 in download center.

Could you please provide version 1433?

entry.title: Error : Could Not Determine mapping steps for message in SAP PO
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I have a IDOC -> PI -> SFTP   scenario that I have implemented with an ICO (I'm using PI 7.50).

while testing i am getting the following error.

Transmitting the message to endpoint <local> using connection AFW failed, due to: com.sap.engine.interfaces.messaging.api.exception.MessagingException: Error encountered while executing mapping: com.sap.aii.af.service.mapping.MappingException: com.sap.aii.utilxi.misc.api.ResourceException: Could not determine mapping steps for message 7e24f305-1f9e-11f0-c2e8-00000c37e086

But it works fine in production not in consolidate system.

please check the message logs of particular message

Please help .

Regards,

Ravi

entry.title: Issue testing RFC connection EU_SCRP_WN32 in DEV/QAS (timeout during allocate)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’m facing an issue when trying to test the RFC connection EU_SCRP_WN32 in the DEV and QAS environments.

When running the connection test, I get the following error:

Interestingly, the same RFC works normally in PRD.

I have already checked the RFC configurations in DEV, QAS, and PRD, and they are identical.

Has anyone faced a similar issue or could provide some guidance on what else I could check?
Could it be something on the local workstation, the Gateway, or some specific configuration in DEV/QAS environments?

Any help would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: SAP HR connection issue
entry.content:
We are facing an issue connecting to AD server from SAP System

The server details are maintained correctly and connection check is also successfully (please refer attached document ->snapshot#6)

However, while calling the Function module LDAP_CREATE and passing the values, we are getting “Object class violation” error message

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Certification status of the HPE MSA 2070 storage system for use with SAP ERP 6.0
entry.content:
I am reaching out to request official information regarding the compatibility and certification status of the HPE MSA 2070 storage system for use with SAP ERP 6.0 Enhancement Package 5 (EHP5) running on a Microsoft SQL Server database.

 

We have reviewed the SAP HANA certified hardware catalog, but it appears to focus primarily on SAP HANA rather than traditional databases like MS SQL.HPE documentation mentions support for SAP HANA with similar MSA models, but there is no clear reference to SAP ERP on MS SQL.

 

 

 

To assist us in making an informed decision, could you please provide clarification on the following points:

  1. Is the HPE MSA 2070 storage system certified for use with SAP ERP 6.0 EHP5 on MS SQL?
  2. If certified, could you kindly provide a link to the official documentation or certification page where this is detailed?
  3. If not certified, can you recommend alternative HPE storage systems that are officially certified for this configuration?
  4. Are there any specific configuration requirements or recommendations for HPE storage systems when used with SAP ERP on MS SQL?

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Program RSXMB_DELETE_MESSAGES issue to delete SAP PO tables, deleting almost none
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am using Program RSXMB_DELETE_MESSAGES to delete SAP PO tables in ECC. Goal is to delete all the records from tables SXMSCLUR, SXMSCLUP except for the last 1 month (retention period). We never achieved or deleted any records and currently have around 214 millions of records in these tables. 

The program above RSXMB_DELETE_MESSAGES worked fine in QA system and deleted the records in 5 days but when I ran this program in Production system, it was deleting only 100 records every ~45min which won't help due to the amount of data we have in those tables and how much we process every day.

Below is the screen shot of the job with parameters and the records deleted every loop. 

Can you please help me understand why it is deleting only 100 records every loop(commit) and how it can be increased to 100K or more every commit/loop. FYI, I checked the parameters between my QA and Production systems and they all are same. Appreciate your help. Thanks.

entry.title: How to remove pacemaker without impacting Application and collab ASCS and ERS in single server
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

 

 

We are upgrading our operating system from Redhat 7.4 to 8.10 and we need to remove the pacemaker (cluster) between these 2 servers . 

 

server01 ASCS

server02 ERS

 

Please be informed that we dont need pacemaker cluster anymore after RH upgrade, we need to run ASCS standalone. Kindly suggest on below -

 

Question 1 - How we can remove the cluster configuration like resource agents, resource groups etc. without impacting the SAP application.

 

Question 2 - Do we run to maintain both servers after removing the cluster config, as we need to run the application with standalon ASCS.

 

Regards,

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automatically export / save update errors and short dumps
entry.content:
Hi,

As auditors keep an eye on missing document numbers, we have to explain these.

We found out they often come from update errors in SM13 (with corresponding short dumps in ST22).

For documentation and analysis we need to be able to access these historically.
As short dumps are reorganized regularly and update errors should be deleted before updates we need another solution.

Is there a way to automatically export update errors and (corresponding) short dumps?

Thank you for feedback & Best regards,

Jonas
